title: Billionaire Row closing: 220 Central Park South penthouse trades for $22.5M
excerpt: Hedge-fund founder James Patrick O'Hara is the buyer behind CPS 50 Holdings, sources said, closing on unit 50A at 220 Central Park South for $22.5M.

title: 15 Central Park West condo trades for $14.2M
excerpt: The buyer is an entity named 15 CPW 20B LLC; the principal could not be reached.

title: Brooklyn Heights townhouse on Remsen sells for $6.1M
excerpt: Buyer took title through a trust; neighbors speculate about the new owner.
